items.claim: Conor McGregor's hormonal balance has been negatively impacted by years of cycling performance-enhancing drugs to recover from his leg injury.
items.quote: Getting on gear, riding it to heal, then coming back off it, messing with your [music] hormones like that for years. That's not free.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has not been focused on training or fight camps for the last five years.
items.quote: Not in the gym, not in a fight camp, for damn sure. 5 years on the sidelines.

items.claim: Max Holloway holds the UFC record for most significant strikes landed in a career with 3,681.
items.quote: Max Holloway has landed more significant strikes than anyone in UFC history. 3,681 in his career.

items.claim: Max Holloway maintains a consistent striking output throughout all five rounds of a fight.
items.quote: He throws about the same number of punches in minute 24 of a fight as he does in minute one.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has a historically poor gas tank that fades early in fights.
items.quote: Conor's biggest weakness in his entire career, cardio.

items.claim: Max Holloway has been dropped in three of his last four fights.
items.quote: Holloway has been dropped in three of his last four fights

items.claim: No fighter has ever returned from a six-year layoff to defeat a current top contender.
items.quote: Nobody has ever sat out for six years and come back against a current top contender [music] and won.
